features.name: Beautiful Chat
features.description: Canonical polished starter chat (same as /examples/integrations/langgraph-python)

features.name: CLI Start Command
features.description: One-liner to scaffold a new CopilotKit app via the official CLI

features.name: Pre-Built CopilotChat
features.description: Pre-built <CopilotChat /> component for full-screen/embedded chat

features.name: Pre-Built: Sidebar
features.description: Docked sidebar chat via <CopilotSidebar />

features.name: Pre-Built: Popup
features.description: Floating popup chat via <CopilotPopup />

features.name: Chat Customization (Slots)
features.description: Customizing chat components via the slot system

features.name: Chat Customization (CSS)
features.description: Customizing chat components via CSS

features.name: Headless Chat (Simple)
features.description: Simple headless UI getting started

features.name: Headless Chat (Complete)
features.description: Full headless UI with messages, tools, gen UI

features.name: Controlled Gen-UI (Display)
features.description: Agent renders typed React components via the useComponent hook

features.name: In-Chat HITL (useHumanInTheLoop — ergonomic API)
features.description: Interactive approval/decision surface rendered inline in the chat. Uses the high-level `useHumanInTheLoop` hook — handles the interrupt lifecycle for you.

features.name: In-Chat HITL (useInterrupt — low-level primitive)
features.description: Interactive component rendered inline in the chat via the lower-level `useInterrupt` primitive — direct control over the LangGraph interrupt lifecycle.

features.name: Headless Interrupt
features.description: Resolve langgraph interrupts headlessly via agent.subscribe + copilotkit.runAgent — no chat, no useInterrupt render prop

features.name: Declarative Generative UI (A2UI — Dynamic Schema)
features.description: Canonical A2UI BYOC — custom catalog wired via a2ui.catalog; runtime injects render_a2ui automatically

features.name: Declarative Generative UI (A2UI — Fixed Schema)
features.description: A2UI rendering against a known, fixed client-side schema

features.name: MCP Apps
features.description: MCP server integration with UI display

features.name: Fully Open-Ended Generative UI
features.description: Agent-generated UI from arbitrary component libraries

features.name: Open-Ended Gen UI (Advanced: with frontend function calling)
features.description: Agent-authored UI that can invoke frontend sandbox functions from inside the iframe

features.name: Tool Rendering (Default Catch-all)
features.description: Out-of-the-box rendering: backend tools surfaced via CopilotKit's built-in default catch-all renderer; no frontend customization

features.name: Tool Rendering (Custom Catch-all)
features.description: Single branded wildcard renderer that paints every tool call — one card handles them all

features.name: Tool Rendering
features.description: Custom per-tool renderers for the tools you care about, plus a wildcard catch-all for the rest

features.name: Tool Rendering + Reasoning Chain
features.description: Sequential tool calls with reasoning tokens rendered side-by-side

features.name: Reasoning
features.description: Visible reasoning/thinking chain alongside the final answer

features.name: Reasoning (Default Render)
features.description: Built-in CopilotChatReasoningMessage renders without a custom slot

features.name: Agentic Generative UI (In-Chat State Rendering)
features.description: Agent-state-driven inline UI: the agent emits a live `steps` plan via copilotkit_emit_state and the frontend renders it with useCoAgentStateRender (v1 hook)

features.name: Frontend Tools (In-app actions)
features.description: Frontend tool execution triggered by the agent

features.name: Frontend Tools (Async)
features.description: useFrontendTool with an async handler — agent awaits a client-side async operation (e.g. DB query) and uses the returned result

features.name: In-App Human in the Loop (Frontend Tools + async HITL)
features.description: Agent calls useFrontendTool with an async handler; the approval UI pops up as an app-level modal OUTSIDE the chat, and a completion callback resolves the pending tool Promise with the user's decision

features.name: Shared State (Read + Write)
features.description: Bidirectional agent state — UI writes preferences, agent writes notes back

features.name: State Streaming
features.description: Per-token state delta streaming from agent to UI

features.name: Readonly State (Agent Context)
features.description: Frontend provides read-only context to the agent via useAgentContext

features.name: Sub-Agents
features.description: Multiple agents with visible task delegation

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Framework-native authentication

features.name: Agent Config Object
features.description: Forwarded props / config objects

features.name: Voice
features.description: Real-time voice interaction

features.name: Multi-modal / File Uploads
features.description: File upload and agent processing

features.name: BYOC Hashbrown
features.description: Hashbrown-style generative UI

features.name: BYOC json-render
features.description: Hashbrown-style generative UI built on json-render

integrations.name: LangGraph (Python)
integrations.description: The most feature-complete CopilotKit integration. LangGraph provides a flexible graph-based framework for building agents with Python. Supports the full range of CopilotKit features including generative UI, shared state, human-in-the-loop, sub-agents, and streaming.

starter.name: Sales Dashboard
starter.description: Full-featured sales pipeline with 5 GenUI rendering strategies

demos.name: CLI Start Command
demos.description: Copy-paste command to clone the canonical starter

demos.name: Agentic Chat
demos.description: Natural conversation with frontend tool execution

demos.name: Chat Customization (CSS)
demos.description: Default CopilotChat re-themed via CopilotKitCSSProperties

demos.name: Tool Rendering (Default Catch-all)
demos.description: Out-of-the-box tool rendering — backend defines the tools; the frontend adds zero custom renderers and relies on CopilotKit's built-in default UI

demos.name: Tool Rendering (Custom Catch-all)
demos.description: Single branded wildcard renderer via useDefaultRenderTool — the same app-designed card paints every tool call

demos.name: Frontend Tools (In-App Actions)
demos.description: Agent invokes client-side handlers registered with useFrontendTool

demos.name: Frontend Tools (Async)
demos.description: useFrontendTool with an async handler — agent awaits a client-side async operation (simulated notes DB query) and uses the returned result

demos.name: In-Chat HITL (useHumanInTheLoop — ergonomic API)
demos.description: Interactive approval/decision surface rendered inline in the chat via the high-level `useHumanInTheLoop` hook

demos.name: In-App Human in the Loop (Frontend Tools + async HITL)
demos.description: Agent requests approval via useFrontendTool with an async handler; the approval UI pops up as an app-level modal OUTSIDE the chat, and a completion callback resolves the pending tool Promise with the user's decision

demos.name: Tool Rendering
demos.description: Custom per-tool renderers (WeatherCard, FlightListCard) plus a wildcard catch-all for every other tool

demos.name: Tool-Based Generative UI
demos.description: Agent uses tools to trigger UI generation

demos.name: Agentic Generative UI
demos.description: Canonical agent-state-driven Gen UI — the agent plans a live step list and emits it via copilotkit_emit_state; the frontend renders it with the v1 useCoAgentStateRender hook

demos.name: Shared State (Read + Write)
demos.description: Bidirectional agent state — UI writes preferences, agent writes notes back

demos.name: State Streaming
demos.description: Per-token state delta streaming from agent to UI

demos.name: Sub-Agents
demos.description: Multiple agents with visible task delegation

demos.name: Pre-Built: Sidebar
demos.description: Docked sidebar chat via <CopilotSidebar />

demos.name: Pre-Built: Popup
demos.description: Floating popup chat via <CopilotPopup />

demos.name: Chat Customization (Slots)
demos.description: Customize CopilotChat via its slot system

demos.name: Headless Chat (Simple)
demos.description: Minimal custom chat surface built on useAgent

demos.name: Headless Chat (Complete)
demos.description: Full chat implementation built from scratch on useAgent

demos.name: Reasoning
demos.description: Visible reasoning/thinking chain alongside the final answer

demos.name: In-Chat HITL (useInterrupt — low-level primitive)
demos.description: Interactive component rendered inline in the chat via the lower-level `useInterrupt` primitive — direct control over the LangGraph interrupt lifecycle

demos.name: Declarative Generative UI (A2UI)
demos.description: Canonical A2UI BYOC — custom catalog (Card/StatusBadge/Metric/InfoRow/PrimaryButton) wired via a2ui.catalog on the provider; runtime injects the render_a2ui tool automatically

demos.name: Declarative Generative UI (A2UI — Fixed Schema)
demos.description: A2UI rendering against a known client-side schema

demos.name: MCP Apps
demos.description: MCP server-driven UI via activity renderers

demos.name: Open-Ended Generative UI
demos.description: Minimal — enable open-ended gen UI in the runtime, nothing else

demos.name: Open-Ended Gen UI (Advanced: with frontend function calling)
demos.description: Agent-authored UI that can invoke frontend sandbox functions from inside the iframe

demos.name: Headless Interrupt (testing)
demos.description: Resolve langgraph interrupts from a plain button grid — no chat, no useInterrupt render prop

demos.name: Readonly State (Agent Context)
demos.description: Frontend provides read-only context to the agent via useAgentContext

demos.name: Reasoning (Default Render)
demos.description: Built-in CopilotChatReasoningMessage renders without a custom slot

demos.name: Tool Rendering + Reasoning Chain (testing)
demos.description: Sequential tool calls with reasoning tokens rendered side-by-side

demos.name: Beautiful Chat
demos.description: Canonical polished starter chat — brand fonts, theme tokens, suggestion pills

integrations.name: LangGraph (TypeScript)
integrations.description: TypeScript variant of the LangGraph integration. Uses @langchain/langgraph to define a graph-based agent with tool calling, shared state, and memory, connected to CopilotKit via the LangGraph AG-UI adapter.
